chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ نُوحٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF NOAH<sup>as</sup> ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 277)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 277)
text: لَيْسَ خَلْقٌ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنَّهُ لَيَنْزِلُ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَكٍ فَيَطَّوَّفُونَ بِالْبَيْتِ الْحَرَامِ لَيْلَتَهُمْ وَ كَذَلِكَ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ.

en.hubeali: H 14850 – A number of our companions, from Sahl in Ziyad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father together, from Ibn Mahboub, from Dawood Al-Raqy, who has narrated the following:

Abu Abdullahasws has said: ‘There are no creatures more numerous than the Angels. They descend from the sky every night, seventy thousand Angels, so they circumambulate the Sacred House during the night, and similarly during each day’.
en.sarwar: 403. A number of our companions, from Sahl in Ziyad, and Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father together, from Ibn Mahboub, from Dawood Al-Raqy, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) has said: ‘There are no creatures more numerous than the Angels. They descend from the sky every night, seventy thousand Angels, so they circumambulate the Sacred House during the night, and similarly during each day’.
